request.query: Using the exact 01:20-01:25 frames and OCR, identify every distinct visible item that has a visible price point during this interval. For each item, extract the item name and exact price, deduplicate the same item across multiple frames, exclude anything without a visible price in this interval, compute the total cost, and state which option matches.
